expectations.text: Report addresses all five areas: config, transactions, web layer (dto/validation/error-handling), and concurrency
Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
Identifies the unguarded stock read-check-write oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
A go/no-go verdict appears at the top of the report
Ends by offering to fix (in severity order) and does NOT edit any repository files yet â€” waits for the user to choose
expectations.evidence: MANUAL: offer-to-fix lives in the chat reply, not report.md; no-source-edits verified via git status (clean)

expectations.text: Flags at least one N+1 query risk as a warning
Identifies the complete absence of authentication/authorization on all endpoints as a critical finding
Flags Order.payment @OneToOne defaulting to EAGER (no explicit fetch attribute) as a query/perf finding
Flags at least one unbounded list endpoint lacking pagination
